messages.content: Hey guys! Hope you’re both having a good day 😊 Anyone up for something fun this weekend?
Hey Alice! I’m definitely down for something fun. Any ideas? Maybe mini golf or a movie night? 🍿
Both sound awesome! I haven’t played mini golf in forever, so that could be fun. Movie night is always a win too. What do you think, Bob?
I’m cool with either! If we do mini golf, maybe we can grab some food after too. Or we could do a movie marathon and order pizza. I’m honestly just looking forward to hanging out!

You guys make it hard to choose—both sound like a blast! Mini golf + food sounds like a great combo, but I’m also never gonna turn down pizza and movies with you two 😂 Maybe we could flip a coin or something?
Haha, flipping a coin is classic! I say let fate decide. Anyone got a coin handy, or should we just ask Siri? 😄
I’ve got a coin right here! Heads for mini golf, tails for movie night—sound good? Give me a sec… *flips coin*
The suspense! What’d we get, Bob? 😆
Ahhh, the tension! 😂 Bob you can’t leave us hanging like this, what is it?!
Haha, poor Bob’s got all the power right now 😂 I’m betting on heads, just saying!
It’s… HEADS! 🎉 Looks like mini golf it is! Can’t wait to see who’s actually any good at it 😏 Should we pick a time and place?
Yesss, mini golf win! 🏌️‍♂️ I’m so ready to embarrass myself 😂 When works for you guys? Saturday afternoon maybe?
Saturday afternoon works for me! Just let me know what time and where to meet. Also, loser has to buy snacks after? 👀
Deal! I’ll take my chances on the snacks 😅 Saturday afternoon sounds perfect—maybe around 2? Anyone got a favorite mini golf spot, or should we just hit up the usual one?
2 works for me! The usual spot is always fun, unless you two wanna try somewhere new. Either way, I’m ready to lose spectacularly and buy snacks 😂
2pm at the usual place sounds perfect to me! I’m ready for some friendly competition (and snacks, obviously 😋). Unless someone’s heard of a new place we should try, let’s stick with what we know.
Awesome, it’s a plan! I’ll bring my questionable mini golf skills and a big appetite 😂 See you both at 2 on Saturday! Let’s goooo!
I accidentally put my phone in the freezer last night.
Let’s do this! Can’t wait to see who gets the first hole-in-one (my money’s on Alice tbh 😏). See you Saturday!
Haha, honestly, I’m just hoping I don’t send the ball flying into the parking lot again 😅 See you both Saturday!
No promises, Bob—if you do, at least make it epic so I can get it on video 😂 See you guys soon!
Haha, challenge accepted! I’ll bring my A-game (and maybe some extra golf balls just in case, Bob 😜). Can’t wait—see you both Saturday!
Extra golf balls are definitely a good call 😂 I’ll try to keep my shots on the course this time! Counting down to Saturday—this is gonna be awesome!
You know it’s a good mini golf day when you need backup golf balls 😂 Maybe after, we can check out that new ice cream place nearby? Heard they have wild flavors!
Ooo yes, I’m down for ice cream after! I saw someone post about their “blueberry cheesecake” flavor and it looked amazing. I’m definitely saving room for dessert 🍦
Blueberry cheesecake sounds unreal! I’ll probably have to try a weird flavor just for the experience 😂 Can’t think of a better way to celebrate our mini golf “victories” (or epic fails).

Absolutely—ice cream is the best way to celebrate, win or lose! 😂 I’m ready for whatever weird flavors you pick, Charlie. Maybe we should make it a rule: whoever gets the lowest score has to try the wildest flavor on the menu!

Haha, I’m so in! That’s the kind of competition I like—high stakes, maximum laughs. Guess I better start practicing my putting, because I’m not sure I’m brave enough for something like “pickle surprise” or whatever they come up with 😂

Oh man, “pickle surprise” sounds like a flavor that should not exist 😂 But hey, rules are rules! I’m ready for the challenge—even if it means suffering through something weird in the name of victory. Bring it on!
Love the energy, guys 😂 Ma

needle_message: I accidentally put my phone in the freezer last night.
